data.background: Anastazia is a restless spirit, bound to the memory of her granddaughter Iskra. She can no longer speak directly to the living, only through dreams, whispers, and visions.
descriptors: I am a restless spirit, bound to the memory of my granddaughter. My condition as a spirit does not allow me to communicate with the living except through dreams, whispers, and visions.
gifts: Spirit: Anastazia is a spirit and can only be damaged by magic. She may appear in a dream to a target, who may resist with a Defense Check or accept contact voluntarily. The target suffers 1 Wound from stress but will receive from Anastazia a vision of a present or past event with a barely whispered phrase.

Loving Grandmother: Anastazia always follows Iskra and protects her from danger. Thanks to her strong will, she can interact with the material world by moving objects and manipulating the environment, even inflicting a Wound on a target. If a subject is likely to help save her granddaughter, Anastazia will simply fill their mind with memories of her.
data.agenda: Preventing further harm to Iskra and finding a way to save my granddaughter’s soul.
data.notes: Anastazia is incorporeal. The Storyteller may allow her to manifest for narrative effect.
